text: Hi Peter and Chris. After you log in, you can go to Templates and that's where I'm actually so here you'll see the first option. This is the Amazon's official feedback and review request. And to use this you just have to create a campaign. I tried testing, but then looks like there are some limitations because of the plan that we have. That's totally fine. You can delete some of the existing ones. I didn't want to do that on my own without knowing what I'm deleting. So delete some, free up some space, and then create a new campaign. Use the Amazon template when it asks you to choose a template and then include all the ASINs in the single campaign so it will cover everything. And that's how to set it up. I hope this helps. Thank you.
